makecode_ts.source:
radio.setGroup(1)
radio.setTransmitPower(1)
let id = 1
basic.showNumber(id)
basic.pause(2000)
basic.clearScreen()
basic.forever(function () {
    radio.sendNumber(id)
    basic.pause(200)
})

micropython.source:
from microbit import *
import radio
radio.config(group=1, power=1)
radio.on()
id = '1' # change this number for each beacon
display.show(id)
sleep(2000)
display.clear()

while True:
    radio.send(id)
    sleep(200)

from microbit import *
import radio
radio.config(group=1)
radio.on()

while True:
    message = radio.receive()
    if message:
        display.show(message)
        sleep(200)
        display.clear()
